name: Uruguay

authority.name: AGESIC — Unidad de Certificación Electrónica (Autoridad Certificadora Raíz Nacional)

notes: Single national root: Autoridad Certificadora Raíz Nacional de Uruguay (RSA-4096, valid to 2031), operated by AGESIC's Unidad de Certificación Electrónica. Fetched directly over HTTPS from AGESIC's official ACRN endpoint by the uy monitor (scripts/monitors/sources/uy.mjs). Accredited subordinate CAs chain to this root and validate themselves at verification time; only the national root is promoted here.
